comments.body: Investigation: Script Tests ci.yml check likely failing due to test_yaml_validation_blocks_invalid_yaml and test_temp_then_move_pattern failures in test-ci-generator.sh (4 assertions failing). Tracking via 6a92-eebc. Will close 156b-23a6 if fixing 6a92-eebc resolves the CI failure.

comments.body: Fix for 6a92-eebc (ci-generator test failures) is included in PR #12 (worktree-20260428-170727). Expecting CI to pass once PR merges. Will close this ticket after CI green on main.
